CREATE TABLE test_table (haystack String, token String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('Hello World', 'Hello World');
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('Hello World', NULL);
SELECT haystack, token, hasTokenOrNull(haystack, token) AS token_check FROM test_table;
SELECT DISTINCT hasTokenOrNull(haystack, token) FROM test_table WHERE haystack LIKE 'Hello%';
WITH (SELECT count() FROM test_table) AS total FROM test_table WHERE hasTokenOrNull(haystack, token) = 1;
SELECT h.haystack, t.token FROM test_table AS h JOIN test_table AS t ON h.haystack = 'Hello World' WHERE hasTokenOrNull(haystack, t.token) = 1;
SELECT haystack, hasTokenOrNull(haystack, 'Hello') AS is_present FROM (SELECT DISTINCT haystack FROM test_table) WHERE is_present = 1;
SELECT IF(hasTokenOrNull(haystack, token) = 1, 'Found', 'Not Found') AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT hasTokenOrNull(haystack, token) AS token_check FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE token IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_table;
